title: Fix overlay picker test import after architecture merge
description: cargo test -p minnow-app failed after merging refactor/simplified-architecture because picker tests imported OverlaySurface through the state re-export after the type moved under state::session.

title: Replace i18n boilerplate with declarative macro
description: Replace 685 LOC of hand-written accessor functions in services/i18n.rs with i18n_fns! macro. Keep same public API.

title: Architecture cleanup and source-of-truth consolidation
description: Refresh active architecture spec/plan, archive superseded docs, then refactor MinnowSnap code and directories toward one source of truth with dead-code and zero-value wrapper cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: One active spec/plan pair remains; old active docs archived; module ownership is clearer; duplicate/dead wrappers removed where verified; quality gates run or blockers recorded.

title: Execute architecture optimization plan
description: Execute docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-15-architecture-optimization.md across capture, settings/preferences, overlay, long capture, platform cleanup, dead exports, and final verification.
close_reason: Architecture optimization tasks completed and verified

title: Execute architecture optimization plan
description: Execute docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-15-architecture-optimization.md against the active architecture optimization spec. Preserve visible UI behavior, use focused verification gates per slice, and track deferred work explicitly.
close_reason: Completed by commit a84cea4 and duplicate minnowsnap-o09 closeout

title: Overlay selection move correctness and drag coalescing
description: Restore correct overlay selection dragging so annotations follow the moved selection and pointer-move updates are coalesced under heavy drag frequency. This work was implemented in commit 8c5bdc5.
design: Track selection_move_origin and selection_move_delta in overlay session state, preview translated annotations during move, commit a single batch annotation translation on release, and queue pointer moves for single-consumption during prepare_frame.
acceptance_criteria: Selection move live preview offsets annotation layer; releasing selection move translates existing annotations once; high-frequency drag pointer updates coalesce to latest pending point; overlay regression tests and cargo build pass.
close_reason: Completed in commit 8c5bdc5 after cargo test -p minnow-ui overlay and cargo build passed

title: Consolidate overlay fragment files
description: Merge state/frame.rs + state/surface.rs into state/session.rs. Merge interaction.rs into view/input.rs. Update mod declarations and imports.

title: Consolidate capture module fragments
description: Merge repository.rs (53 LOC) and source.rs (39 LOC) into capture/mod.rs. Keep action.rs and target.rs separate.

title: Inline settings setter methods into apply()
description: Remove 13 trivial private setter methods in settings.rs, inline their one-liner closures directly into the SettingsAction match arms.

title: Consolidate OCR and pin state ownership
description: Audit services/ocr and ui/features/pin for duplicate OCR text, geometry, progress, and model availability state; move ownership to services or feature state per active spec.
acceptance_criteria: One owner remains for OCR model availability, recognition results, pin geometry, and displayed text; tests or smoke checks cover changed behavior.

title: Split oversized overlay annotation engine
description: Break ui/features/overlay/annotation/engine.rs into focused document mutation, hit testing, and render-prep modules without changing overlay behavior.
acceptance_criteria: engine.rs no longer owns unrelated responsibilities; module_layout_smoke and full minnow-app tests pass.

title: Plan architecture cleanup
description: Create current architecture optimization spec and implementation plan; archive superseded cleanup docs before code refactor.
close_reason: Created new architecture optimization spec/plan and archived superseded active cleanup docs.

title: Investigate transitive dirs/once_cell lock entries
description: Codebase cleanup verification found that dirs and once_cell still remain in Cargo.lock after removing direct usage from minnow-app and workspace dependency declarations. Current reverse dependencies point to upstream/transitive chains such as gpui_util, rust-embed, rustls, async-std, and related crates. Determine whether the plan should accept transitive lock entries or whether additional dependency upgrades/pruning are required.
notes: Investigation 2026-05-16: no direct dirs/once_cell references remain in Cargo.toml or crates/*/Cargo.toml. Cargo.lock entries are transitive. dirs@4.0.0 comes through gpui_util; dirs@5.0.1 through zed-font-kit/gpui; dirs@6.0.0 through shellexpand/rust-embed and also target-all chains via auto-launch/font-kit/direct directories deps. once_cell comes through upstream chains including gpui/gpui-component/gpui_http_client/async-std, global-hotkey, tray-icon/muda, rust-i18n, rustls/reqwest, tempfile/gpui_util, tracing stack, and target-all gtk/js-sys/open chains. cargo machete --with-metadata found no unused direct dependencies. Accept these lock entries; no pruning needed unless upstream gpui/rust-embed/global-hotkey/reqwest/tray-icon versions change.
close_reason: Transitive lock entries accepted; no direct dependency cleanup remains

title: Codebase cleanup final inline and verification
description: Active codebase-cleanup plan tasks 7-8: inline key_unicode usage, remove the dead module, then run final build, test, and clippy verification for minnow-app.

title: Codebase cleanup parameter-struct refactors
description: Active codebase-cleanup plan tasks 5-6: replace too-many-arguments geometry and stitcher functions with parameter/context structs and update call sites.

title: Codebase cleanup foundational tasks
description: Active codebase-cleanup plan tasks 1-4: remove dead code, eliminate redundant dependencies, deduplicate constants and trivial wrappers, and tighten visibility in crates/minnow-app.
notes: 2026-05-13: tasks 1-2 completed in crates/minnow-app. Removed dead helpers in i18n/clipboard/fonts, made normalize_locale_tag private, switched storage picture-dir lookup to directories::UserDirs, switched shutdown control plane to std::sync::LazyLock, removed minnow-app deps dirs and once_cell. Verification: cargo check -p minnow-app; cargo test -p minnow-app normalize_locale_tag -- --nocapture.

title: Task 6: decompose overlay around session boundary
description: From docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-repo-wide-architecture-cleanup.md Task 6. Make OverlaySession the explicit state center, shrink overlay/state/mod.rs materially, remove ceremonial routing where input/commands/effects only bounce to the same owner, preserve annotation/render depth where useful. Verification: cargo check -p minnow-app, cargo test -p minnow-app overlay, targeted tests for moved state logic.
close_reason: Repo-wide architecture cleanup tasks 6-9 verified: cargo check -p minnow-app and cargo test -p minnow-app pass.

title: Task 5: flatten pin feature glue
description: From docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-repo-wide-architecture-cleanup.md Task 5. Merge tiny pin glue files into real state/view modules, keep keybinding setup inline unless reused, and reduce re-export/bootstrap glue in pin/mod.rs. Verification: cargo check -p minnow-app and pin-focused tests if added.
close_reason: Task 5 pin glue flattened and reviewed; cargo check and pin tests pass.

title: Task 4: flatten preferences feature state
description: From docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-repo-wide-architecture-cleanup.md Task 4. Collapse oversliced preferences state layout, keep one transient UI state owner, retain only real mutation/policy seams, and remove wrapper store/delegation layers. Verification: cargo check -p minnow-app and preference-related tests if introduced.
close_reason: Task 4 preferences flattening implemented and reviewed; cargo check, cargo fmt, and preference tests pass.

title: Task 3: centralize settings access API
description: From docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-repo-wide-architecture-cleanup.md Task 3. Make services/settings.rs the only obvious settings boundary, replace scattered direct SETTINGS reads/writes with named API functions, and remove thin forwarding wrappers. Verification: cargo check -p minnow-app and cargo test -p minnow-app.
close_reason: Task 3 settings facade implemented and reviewed; cargo check passes, targeted shortcut regression passes; full tests blocked only by later Task 7 layout guard.

title: Task 2: normalize top-level boundary ownership
description: From docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-repo-wide-architecture-cleanup.md Task 2. Move shell/window helpers to canonical platform ownership, remove module_tag placeholders, keep ui/support pure UI-only, and update imports. Verification: cargo check -p minnow-app and cargo test -p minnow-app --test module_layout_smoke.
close_reason: Task 2 boundary ownership normalized and reviewed; cargo check passes, Task 2 guard passes.

title: Task 1: architecture guard tests for repo-wide cleanup
description: From docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-13-repo-wide-architecture-cleanup.md Task 1. Replace migration-history smoke tests with implementation-oriented architecture guards: thin main.rs, single-crate workspace shape, ownership boundary guards, and forbidden feature-private imports. Verification: cargo test -p minnow-app --test module_layout_smoke and any new integration test.
close_reason: Task 1 guards implemented and reviewed; expected remaining failures are later-task architecture violations.

title: Overlay HUD should hide move affordances during active selection drag
description: Selection move is now wired into runtime input flow, but the view layer still treats active selection move as a locked idle selection. Resize handles and toolbar can remain visible during drag because HUD visibility keys off drag_mode while selection move uses side-state.
design: Either expose an explicit moving state to the view or teach frame/view rendering to treat active selection_move_origin as move-in-progress when computing overlay affordances.
acceptance_criteria: During active selection move, resize handles and toolbar visibility match drag-in-progress behavior; a regression test covers the view state while selection_move_delta/origin are active.

title: Merge platform/async_ui.rs into mod.rs
description: Move app_ready() and update_app() (10 LOC) into platform/mod.rs. Update all imports.
